## Summary

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include console errors if any.

## Environment

- Browser and version:
- OS:
- Engine version / commit:

## Notes

If the issue involves customized `config.js` or replaced assets, please mention
it — but note that asset-replacement support is out of scope (see
`CONTRIBUTING.md`).
